comment: Map data seam. The static corridor map image is the current presentation layer; the geometry below is placeholder structure ready to receive real GeoJSON and a tile provider (Leaflet / MapLibre) later. TODO: replace placeholder coordinates with surveyed boundary geometry.

focused.alt: Map of the focused Lake Forest Cultural District corridor along Lake Forest Boulevard from Crowder Boulevard to Bullard Avenue, with numbered cultural asset markers and Joe W. Brown Park
focused.caption: The focused corridor: Crowder → Bullard, ~3 walkable miles along the old main street.

broad.alt: Earlier, broader proposed district map spreading across large residential areas of New Orleans East
broad.caption: Before: a broad, diffuse map spread across residential areas that don't directly benefit. Hard to message. Hard to deliver.

properties.name: LFCD proposed boundary — PLACEHOLDER, awaiting surveyed geometry
